open_questions: Confirm live ETH spot versus May 31, 2026 fair value marks before sizing; mechanical refresh uses price **$15.69** on 2026-07-17.
Review preferred stock (BMNP) and warrant claims on treasury economics; not fully modeled in static look-through.
Tom Lee July 16, 2026 investor presentation (8-K Exhibit 99.1) is Reg FD context only, not in base IRR.
Decide whether ETH treasury names belong in ls-algo underlying sleeve at watch weight given dilution path.
thesis: Bitmine Immersion Technologies is a U.S.-listed digital asset company that pivoted in calendar 2025 from small-scale bitcoin immersion mining and equipment sales into an **Ethereum treasury strategy**. **[Fact]** Management reoriented the business in the third calendar quarter of 2025 to prioritize ETH accumulation, staking, and capital markets funding while winding down proprietary self-mining. **[Fact]** At May 31, 2026 the company held **5,416,945 ETH** at fair value **$10.86 billion** plus **203 BTC** at **$15 million** fair value. **[Fact]** Common shares outstanding were **579.7 million** versus **232.4 million** at August 31, 2025 after repeated ATM and private placements. **[Fact]** Nine-month revenue through May 31, 2026 was **$59.9 million**, dominated by **$56.9 million** of staking and validation revenue; legacy mining and equipment were immaterial. **[Fact]** Thomas J. Lee serves as executive chairman following a 2025 board leadership change tied to the treasury pivot.
why_market_wrong: **Predictive attribute:** market structure discount (levered crypto treasury with K-1-like complexity, extreme dilution, and mark-to-market GAAP noise).
